_comment: Example schema — generate yours with: discover.py <vault> → review → save as schema.json

path_type_hints._comment: folder substring → type name (used when card has no type field)

status_order._comment: sort order for MOC generation (lower = higher priority)

status_defaults._comment: default status for new cards by type (when status is missing)

richness_fields._comment: frontmatter fields that indicate content richness (used by dedup)

conflict_fields._comment: scalar facts where a NEW differing value supersedes the old (recency wins); the losing value is recorded to ## History. Used by dedup merge + supersede scan.

identity._comment: same-entity detection for dedup/supersede grouping. Cards sharing a strong key (exact normalized match on match_fields) are grouped across different filenames. Name-only never groups (fuzzy off — a false merge is worse than a duplicate). Remove this block to disable and keep exact-stem grouping only.
